metadata.title: SharePwd — Burn After Reading
metadata.description: Share passwords and secrets that self-destruct after reading. Zero-knowledge encryption, built by a cybersecurity team. Your data never touches our servers in plaintext.

footer.zeroKnowledge: Zero-knowledge encryption — your data never touches our servers in plaintext.
footer.hosting: Hosted in France by OVHCloud, a trusted European cloud provider. Not subject to any extraterritorial legislation (Cloud Act, FISA, etc.).

home.description: Share passwords and secrets that self-destruct. Encrypted in your browser, unreadable on our servers, gone after viewing.
home.featZkDesc: AES-256-GCM encryption in your browser. The key stays in the URL fragment — never sent to our servers.
home.featBurnDesc: Secrets self-destruct after viewing. Set view limits, time-based expiration, or one-time read. No traces left behind.
home.featAntiBotDesc: 5-layer defense: grace period, challenge gate, nonces, behavioral analysis, and UA detection.
home.featCliDesc: Full REST API and CLI tool. Integrate secret sharing into your CI/CD pipelines and scripts.
home.featFileDesc: Share encrypted files up to 5MB. Need more? Paid plans support up to 100MB+.
home.featOssDesc: AGPLv3 licensed. Audit the code, self-host it, contribute. Full transparency.
home.howStep1Desc: Your secret is encrypted with AES-256-GCM using the Web Crypto API. The encryption key is generated randomly and never leaves your device.
home.howStep2Desc: Only the ciphertext is sent to our server. We store it with your chosen expiration rules. We cannot decrypt it.
home.howStep3Title: Share the link — it burns after reading
home.howStep3Desc: The encryption key is embedded in the URL fragment (#), never sent to the server. The recipient decrypts locally, then the secret self-destructs.
home.sovereigntyDesc: SharePwd is hosted in France by OVHCloud, a trusted European cloud provider. Your data stays in Europe and is not subject to any extraterritorial legislation such as the US Cloud Act, FISA, or similar foreign surveillance laws.

create.title: Share a Secret
create.subtitle: Your secret is encrypted in your browser before being sent to our server.

createForm.contentPlaceholder: Paste your password, API key, or any secret here...
createForm.passphraseHintSet: The recipient will need this passphrase. Share it via a separate channel.
createForm.passphraseHintNone: Without a passphrase, the encryption key is in the URL. Anyone with the link can decrypt.
createForm.burnLabel: Burn after reading (destroyed after first view)
createForm.emptyError: Please enter some content to share
createForm.successDescPassphrase: Share this link with the recipient. They will need the passphrase to decrypt it.
createForm.successDescLink: Share this link with the recipient. The encryption key is embedded in the URL fragment.
createForm.passphraseWarning: Remember to share the passphrase via a separate channel.

fileUpload.passphraseWarning: Remember to share the passphrase via a separate channel.
fileUpload.dropzone: Drop a file here or click to browse

reveal.burnWarning: This secret has been destroyed and cannot be viewed again.
reveal.sharedTitle: Someone shared a secret with you
reveal.burnNotice: This secret will be destroyed after viewing
reveal.passphrasePlaceholder: Enter the passphrase shared with you
reveal.errorExpired: This secret has expired or been deleted.
reveal.errorDecrypt: Failed to decrypt. The link may be corrupted.
reveal.errorNotFound: Secret not found or has expired.
reveal.errorWait: Please wait a moment before revealing the secret.
reveal.errorInteract: Please move your mouse or interact with the page first.

fileDownload.sharedTitle: Someone shared a file with you
fileDownload.burnNotice: This file will be destroyed after download
fileDownload.errorExpired: This file has expired or been deleted.
fileDownload.errorDecrypt: Failed to decrypt. The link may be corrupted.
fileDownload.errorNotFound: File not found or has expired.
fileDownload.errorWait: Please wait a moment and interact with the page first.

docs.title: API Documentation
docs.authDesc: All endpoints are public and do not require authentication. Rate limited to 30 requests/minute per IP.
docs.getMetadataDesc: Get secret metadata (without decrypted content). Returns a challenge nonce for reveal.
docs.revealDesc: Reveal the encrypted secret. Consumes a view. Requires a valid challenge nonce.
docs.deleteDesc: Delete a secret. Requires the creator token.
docs.rateLimitsDesc: All endpoints are rate limited to {limit} requests per minute per IP address.
docs.rateLimitsExceeded: When the limit is exceeded, the API returns
docs.encryptionDesc: SharePwd uses zero-knowledge encryption. The server never sees your plaintext data.
docs.encAlgo: Algorithm: AES-256-GCM (256-bit key, 96-bit IV, 128-bit auth tag)
docs.encKdf: Key derivation (passphrase): PBKDF2 with SHA-256, 600,000 iterations
docs.encNoPass: Without passphrase: random key embedded in URL fragment (#)
docs.encFragment: The URL fragment is never sent to the server (per HTTP spec)

cliDocs.title: CLI Documentation
cliDocs.selfHostNotice: The CLI requires SSH access to the server running SharePwd. It is not available on sharepwd.io — it is designed for self-hosted instances.
cliDocs.installDesc: Download the pre-built binary for your platform from GitHub Releases:
cliDocs.deleteDesc: Delete a secret using its creator token
cliDocs.versionDesc: Show version, commit and build date
cliDocs.flagFile: Path to a file to encrypt and share
cliDocs.flagBurn: Burn after reading (destroyed after first view)
cliDocs.selfHostDesc: Point the CLI to your own SharePwd server using the --server flag:
cliDocs.encryptionDesc: The CLI uses the exact same cryptographic primitives as the web frontend, ensuring full cross-compatibility.
cliDocs.encCompat: Secrets created in the CLI can be decrypted in the browser, and vice versa
cliDocs.encAlgo: Algorithm: AES-256-GCM (256-bit key, 96-bit IV, 128-bit auth tag)
cliDocs.encKdf: Key derivation (passphrase): PBKDF2 with SHA-256, 600,000 iterations
cliDocs.encKeyless: Without passphrase: random key embedded in URL fragment (#), never sent to server
